Name: DANCIN' MITTEN BLADE HEAD COVER - WHITE
Description: The Dancin' Mitten headcover is a limited edition blade-style putter headcover that features Michigan's infamous silhouette. The design also includes dancing mittens adding a fun and unique touch. The headcover is designed with a strong magnetic closure and plush interior fabric to protect your putter head from scratches and dings. This headcover is the perfect way to show off your love for Michigan while on the course. Whether you’re looking to sport your state spirit or just admire our quirky design, this headcover will have you dancin’ on the green after sinking that winning putt!
